title: Сизиф и камень — постоянство
style: Flat minimalist vector mascot style, same character design, proportions, dark teal background and warm palette as the reference image(s). Vertical 9:16, full body, centered, no text, clean bold shapes.

scenes.image: the mortal youth determinedly pushing a big round boulder up a steep hill, sweating but focused, his little flame creature burning steady and bright beside him
scenes.motion: the character pushes the boulder slowly uphill, the little flame flickers steadily, dust rises
scenes.vo: Каждый день ты катишь свой камень в гору.
scenes.caption: Каждый день — твой камень в гору

scenes.image: Dionysus the relaxed god lounging with a golden wine cup, lazily gesturing for the mortal to stop and join him, tempting and carefree
scenes.motion: Dionysus swirls the wine cup lazily, beckoning, the mortal hesitates
scenes.vo: Дионис шепчет: «Брось, он всё равно скатится. Выпей со мной».
scenes.caption: «Брось, всё равно скатится…»

scenes.image: the mortal lets go of the boulder which rolls back down the hill, he looks defeated, his little flame creature shrunk small and dim, almost going out
scenes.motion: the boulder rolls downhill, the character slumps, the flame shrinks and dims
scenes.vo: Стоит отпустить один раз — и всё катится вниз. Огонёк гаснет.
scenes.caption: Отпустил один раз — всё вниз

scenes.image: Prometheus the bearded titan in a toga puts a firm hand on the mortal's shoulder, encouraging him to push again; the youth grips the boulder with renewed resolve, his flame creature glowing steady
scenes.motion: calm steady motion, the mortal leans into the boulder again, the flame glows warm and even
scenes.vo: Дисциплина — не докатить однажды. Это катить каждый день.
scenes.caption: Дисциплина = катить КАЖДЫЙ день
